title: brodiaea philippiana
intro: Brodiaea philippiana, also known as the golden brodiaea or golden brodiaea lily, is a perennial flowering plant in the lily family that is native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Brodiaea philippiana include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed raw or dried and powdered for use in herbal remedies.
